How can I earn a Co-op Member Reward on my water bottles purchase?

REI Co-op Members get 10% back annually on every eligible purchase, including most full-priced water bottles. (10% is typical but not guaranteed.)

To earn or redeem rewards, buy a one-time $30 lifetime membership, or sign in as a member. See details about the Co-op Member Reward .

At REI Co-op, we carry a wide range of water bottles starting around $50 with some higher-end brands and models costing over $100.
